used_for: PentAGI main reasoning model for the AI security audit agent
assignment_requirement: The selected LLM must cost less than USD 1.00 per 1 million tokens and have sufficient context window for security audit tasks.

context_window.requirement: Sufficient for Rules of Engagement, tool outputs, logs, and vulnerability reasoning
context_window.context_size: Large-context model suitable for agentic security audit

justification: Qwen3 30B A3B is selected as the main PentAGI reasoning model because it is suitable for coding, tool-use reasoning, and cybersecurity audit workflows.
The model satisfies the assignment cost requirement of below USD 1.00 per 1 million tokens.
The context window is sufficient to include the Rules of Engagement, target scope, tool outputs, Neo4j action logs, and audit reasoning.
Using OpenRouter allows one API endpoint to access the selected model and manage usage through API keys and credit limits.

embedding_model_note.purpose: Embedding or retrieval support only, not the main PentAGI reasoning LLM
embedding_model_note.reason: The attached screenshot shows an embedding model. It can support retrieval, but it should not be treated as the main chat model for PentAGI reasoning.
